name: Milk Market
description: Model Context Protocol server for Milk Market — a permissionless, Bitcoin-native marketplace for local food and decentralized food systems built on Nostr. Browse and buy products, manage shops and listings, send messages, and operate a Cashu wallet.

payments.description: Paid endpoints follow the L402 standard: they respond with HTTP 402 and a WWW-Authenticate: L402 challenge (macaroon + bolt11 Lightning invoice). Cashu, Stripe, and manual fiat are also supported.

authentication.description: Bearer API key. Some read tools are available without a key; purchasing requires read_write and account/shop management requires full_access.

webBotAuth.description: HTTP Message Signatures (RFC 9421) public-key directory for verifiable agent identity (Web Bot Auth). Milk Market publishes its Ed25519 verification keys here; agents may advertise their own directory via the Signature-Agent header.
